title: cleisostoma bhutanicum
intro: Cleisostoma bhutanicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the Bhutan Cleisostoma or the Bhutan Yellow Orchid. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleisostoma bhutanicum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cleisostoma bhutanicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
